# Integrative Psychiatry

> Integrative Psychiatry is a physician-led psychiatry practice in West Hartford, Connecticut, led by Douglas Zelisko, MD.

This site is intended for prospective and current patients seeking information about appointment pathways, practice services, fees and insurance, resources, and contact information.

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://site.docz.space/): Practice overview, philosophy of care, services, and scheduling pathways.
- [About Dr. Zelisko](https://site.docz.space/about): Physician background, training, and care philosophy.
- [Services](https://site.docz.space/services): Overview of psychiatric evaluation, psychotherapy, medication management, integrative psychiatry, and related care.
- [Psychotherapy](https://site.docz.space/services/psychotherapy): Information about psychotherapy services.
- [Medication Management](https://site.docz.space/services/medication-management): Information about medication management services.
- [Resources & FAQ](https://site.docz.space/resources): Educational resources and frequently asked questions.
- [Fees & Insurance](https://site.docz.space/fees-insurance): Payment pathways, private-pay information, superbills, and insurance-related details.
- [Ketamine-Assisted Psychotherapy](https://site.docz.space/ketamine-therapy): Information about the ketamine-assisted psychotherapy pathway.
- [New Patients](https://site.docz.space/new-patients): Scheduling pathway for new patient evaluation appointments.
- [Current Patients](https://site.docz.space/current-patients): Follow-up appointment and patient portal links.
- [Contact](https://site.docz.space/contact): Office location, phone, email, contact form, and administrative contact options.

## Key Topics

- Comprehensive psychiatric evaluations
- Psychodynamic psychotherapy
- Medication management
- ADHD and focus concerns
- Anxiety and mood concerns
- Trauma and PTSD
- Grief and life transitions
- Integrative psychiatry
- Ketamine-assisted psychotherapy

## Legal and Policy Pages

- [Privacy Policy](https://site.docz.space/privacy-policy)
- [Notice of Privacy Practices](https://site.docz.space/notice-of-privacy-practices)
- [Terms of Use](https://site.docz.space/terms-of-use)
- [Emergency Disclaimer](https://site.docz.space/emergency-disclaimer)
